zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel "hir" ap Gruffudd於大約1185年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach56歲，母親Margred ferch Gronwy35歲。他和Gwenhwyfar ferch Gronwy至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: "hir"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Widespread’; ‘broad’; also short for any name beginning with Hiro‐.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel "hir" ap Gruffudd was born about 1185, in Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, was 56 and his mother, Margred ferch Gronwy, was 35. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Gwenhwyfar ferch Gronwy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel "hir" ap Gruffudd est né environ 1185, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Margred ferch Gronwy, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Gwenhwyfar ferch Gronwy.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel "hir" ap Gruffudd um 1185 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach 56 und seine Mutter Margred ferch Gronwy 35. Er hatte mit Gwenhwyfar ferch Gronwy mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel "hir" ap Gruffudd è nato il circa 1185 nel Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Margred ferch Gronwy, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Gwenhwyfar ferch Gronwy.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel "hir" ap Gruffuddが約1185年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ap Ifor Bachは56歳，母Margred ferch Gronwyは35歳であった。彼はGwenhwyfar ferch Gronwyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel "hir" ap Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1185년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Margred ferch Gronwy(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Gwenhwyfar ferch Gronwy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel "hir" ap Gruffudd родился около 1185 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Margred ferch Gronwy, 35. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Gwenhwyfar ferch Gronwy.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel "hir" ap Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1185, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Margred ferch Gronwy, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Gwenhwyfar ferch Gronwy.
